message.content:
[cron:a89d00ef-6d96-4aaf-8759-504c4ac72a3c AInchors Task Queue Processor (15min)] TQP_RUN: Execute the task queue processor. Run:
bash /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/task-queue-processor.sh

This processes ONE task per run: picks up queued → dispatches, or verifies dispatched → marks done/re-queues/escalates. The script handles everything internally. Capture and report the exit code and key output lines. If escalation occurs (script calls sovereign-alert.sh), that happens independently.

No need to interpret or act on the output beyond reporting it briefly.
Current time: Saturday, July 18th, 2026 - 1:52 PM (Australia/Sydney)
Reference UTC: 2026-07-18 03:52 UTC

content.text: TQP: No queued, resumable, or dispatched tasks. Exiting.
